base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of temple_of_fiends_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Temple of Fiends — starting/ending dungeon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Temple of Fiends — starting/ending dungeon; stone-ruin tiles (128×128)
